name: property-os-template
description: Codex and Claude ready operating workspace for premium rental property workflows.

scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-content.mjs && node scripts/privacy-scan.mjs && node scripts/install-plan-smoke.mjs && node scripts/agent-workflow-dry-run.mjs && npm --prefix mcp/server test
scripts.audit: npm audit --audit-level=moderate && npm --prefix mcp/server run audit
